name: Nebraska School Bus Inc

Business directory (ChamberofCommerce.com) confirms a 'Nebraska School Bus' located at 305 S 4th St, Battle Creek, NE 68715, phone (402) 675-5802 — matches input address. NE SOS entity search requires interactive CAPTCHA, not retrievable via WebFetch. Could not confirm inc_date, officers, entity_status.

notes: Strong match on name + city + state (Lake City, MN). MCS-150 last updated 05/12/2025 (current). Sole provider for Lake City, Wabasha-Kellogg, and Plainview-Elgin-Millville school districts.

DBA 'Kiessling School Transportation' is part of Kiessling Transit Inc (parent), headquartered at 206 Dedham St, Norfolk, MA (corporate office), with operating yard at 121 Depot St, Bellingham, MA (per SAFER) and 101 Constitution Blvd, Franklin, MA (input address — likely school-transportation division office). MCS-150 updated 04/28/2026 — current. 2,963,243 miles in 2025; 5 reportable crashes (3 injury, 2 tow) in trailing 24 months. Family-owned (Kiessling family); founded 1970/71.
